title: VS Code: pckg registry, platform-spec, and book deep links

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
VS Code: pckg registry, platform-spec, and book deep links

## Scope

Extend beskid_vscode beyond cli-latest LSP bootstrap (v0.3): open pckg package docs from workspace, link diagnostics to platform-spec nodes, and surface book/reference URLs in command palette.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)
- **Status:** Backlog

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `vscode-editor`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-vscode-pckg-docs`

## Baseline

v0.3 landed inventory docs at `aaddd32`; v0.4 completes integration UX.
